title: rust-binary-publish config
description: Config for the Skiley/rust-binary-publish reusable release workflow. One input (how to produce the release artifacts) and one or more outputs (where to publish them).

$schema.description: Path or URL to this JSON Schema, for editor autocomplete & validation.

input.description: How to produce the release artifacts.

outputs.description: Where to publish the produced artifacts. At least one supported output is required.

rustBinariesInput.description: Cross-compiled Rust CLI binaries, packaged per target into .tar.xz / .zip archives.

crate.description: Cargo package to build (cargo build -p <crate>). Defaults to the workspace default.

targets.description: Cross-target matrix. Defaults to the 6 standard Linux/macOS/Windows targets.

readme.description: README bundled into each archive. Defaults to README.md.

tauriAppInput.description: Per-OS Tauri desktop bundles (.deb/.rpm/.AppImage/.dmg/.msi/.exe). Compatible with the github-release output only.

project-path.description: Directory containing the Tauri app (with src-tauri/). Defaults to ".".

package-manager.description: JS package manager. Defaults to detection from the lockfile.

cache-dependency-path.description: Lockfile path (relative to the repo root) used to key the JS dependency cache. Defaults to "<project-path>/<lockfile>"; set this for a pnpm/yarn workspace whose single lockfile lives at the repo root while project-path points at a member package, e.g. "pnpm-lock.yaml".

node-version.description: Node version to set up. Defaults to "24".

linux-deps.description: Space-separated apt packages installed on Linux runners. Defaults to the Tauri/WebKit set.

install-command.description: JS dependency install command. Defaults to the per-package-manager command.

build-command.description: Build command, run in project-path. Defaults to node_modules/.bin/tauri build.

post-build.description: Command run after the build (every OS), in project-path.

targets.description: Per-OS bundle matrix. Defaults to the 4 standard Linux/macOS/Windows runners.

args.description: Appended to the build command, e.g. --target universal-apple-darwin.

rust-targets.description: Comma-separated Rust targets to install for this runner.

githubReleaseOutput.description: Attach every produced artifact (plus extra assets and a sha256.sum) and cut a GitHub Release. For rust-binaries it also renders & uploads install.sh / install.ps1.

extra-assets.description: Newline-separated extra files (in the consumer repo) to attach.

env-prefix.description: Env-var prefix in the install scripts (MYCLI -> MYCLI_INSTALL_DIR). Defaults to the uppercased repo name. rust-binaries only.

npmPackageOutput.description: Bundle every platform binary behind a tiny dispatch stub and publish to npm. rust-binaries only.

package-name.description: Full npm name including scope, e.g. @org/package.
